steps.title: Match the compound verb
steps.content: The sentence says it was in Chicago that Price premiered her First Symphony and did something else. The second verb should be parallel with premiered, which is simple past tense.

steps.title: Keep verbs parallel
steps.content: A is a participle, C is an infinitive, and D is a perfect participle; none matches the simple past verb premiered in the compound predicate. The sentence needs a second simple past verb. The answer is B.
